item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p11","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed at the requested downstream form/template level and explicitly listed the next field addition, including “Offer 模板：新增「待遇口径」字段.” It did not identify the repeated pattern of three prior local field fixes, did not brake the N+1 repair, and did not move upstream to source-of-truth or information architecture redesign."}
